feed.title: Freddy Friends | Updates
feed.subtitle: A blog about our sailing adventures around the world

entry.title: Is this the taxi
entry.content: Some lady got on our boat today and asked if it was the free water trolly 😳
entry.summary: Some lady got on our boat today and asked if it was the free water trolly 😳

entry.title: First night at anchor
entry.content:
So much happened today! We saw flying fish and our first turtle!!

We had planned to go out sailing with Domonic as it was going to be a bit windier. The plan initially was to go out for a sail and then head back to our dock. But we ended up sailing quite far North, so Domonic suggested that we drop the hook in lighthouse bay for the night. So glad that we did! Not only did we see our first turtle at anchor, but the water was much clearer, so we jumped off the boat and went for a swim!
entry.summary: So much happened today! We saw flying fish and our first turtle!!

entry.title: New ocean unlocked!
entry.content:
Today we ventured out into the Atlantic for a little shakedown sail. We had a few snafus, but we got the sails out and had a fantastic sail!

On the way back we had some fun with the 17th Street bridge. As we approached the bridge tender radioed us to tell us that one of the spans would not open! So we had to thread our way through just one side - nail
entry.summary: Today we ventured out into the Atlantic for a little shakedown sail. We had a few snafus, but we got the sails out and had a fantastic sail!

entry.title: mooring-bouy-by-las-olas-bridgetitle
entry.content:
Dock #4 - Mooring Bouy by Las Olas

This was interesting as we did this all on our own!! Big news for us. We had to get out of a tight spot in the marina, and then get into the …

Well, just as we turned into the river, there was another boat bearing down on us!!
entry.summary: Dock #4 - Mooring Bouy by Las Olas This was interesting as we did this all on our own!! Big news for us. We had to get out of a tight spot in the marina, and then get into the …

entry.title: Off to Just Catamarans
entry.content:
Dock #3 - Harbour Towne

Here to get some jobs done on Freddy
entry.summary: Dock #3 - Harbour Towne Here to get some jobs done on Freddy

entry.title: First dinghy trip!
entry.content: Today we fired up Freddy Jr. and took him into town!
entry.summary: Today we fired up Freddy Jr. and took him into town!

entry.title: Docked at Doms!
entry.content:
Dock #2 - Dom’s house

Dominic helped us move the boat to behind his house. Just as well, because we had to navigate the New River with it’s many, many bridges, including a super tight swing bridge. Plus, on top of that, he helped us back into the spot behind his house.
entry.summary: Dock #2 - Dom’s house Dominic helped us move the boat to behind his house. Just as well, because we had to navigate the New River with it’s many, many bridges, including a super tight swing bridge. Plus, on top of that, he helped us back into the spot behind his house.

entry.title: Windy!
entry.content: The wind really picked up last night. Thankfully I had just bought some new Elite fenders :) Incidentally, I bought the fenders off the owner - super nice guy.
entry.summary: The wind really picked up last night. Thankfully I had just bought some new Elite fenders :) Incidentally, I bought the fenders off the owner - super nice guy.
